title: Degiskenler ve Tipler
subtitle: Temel veri tipleri ve degisken tanimlama.
code:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strconv"
)

func main() {
	var age int = 25
	var price float64 = 19.99
	var name string = "Ahmet"
	var isActive bool = true

	fmt.Println("Isim:", name)
	fmt.Println("Yas:", age)
	fmt.Println("Fiyat:", price)
	fmt.Println("Aktif mi:", isActive)

	// Kisa degisken tanimlama (:=)
	city := "Istanbul"
	fmt.Println("\nSehir:", city)

	// Tip donusumu
	ageText := strconv.Itoa(age)
	parsedAge, _ := strconv.Atoi("30")
	parsedPrice, _ := strconv.ParseFloat("9.5", 64)

	fmt.Println("\nYas metni:", ageText)
	fmt.Println("Donusturulen yas:", parsedAge)
	fmt.Println("Donusturulen fiyat:", parsedPrice)

	// const kullanimi
	const Pi = 3.14159
	fmt.Println("\nPi sayisi:", Pi)

	// Coklu atama
	x, y, z := 1, 2, 3
	fmt.Println("\nCoklu atama:", x, y, z)
}
